issues.description: Condition should use LeaderHasAnyType with types ["Fish-Man","Merfolk"] instead of HasCardOnBoard. The effect checks the Leader's type, not board presence.
Rest action is optional ("You may rest") but DSL does not express optionality. Should wrap in conditional or use optional flag if supported.
PlayFromHand action missing optional/conditional wrapping. The play is contingent on the rest being performed ("If your Leader..."). Current structure implies play always happens.
